name: Apple Noodle Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 cup finely chopped all-purpose apple -- (about 1 medium)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a square pan, 8 x 8 x 2 inches, with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Place all ingredients except noodles, apple, and raisins in a blender or food processor.
4. Cover and blend until smooth.
5. Pour the mixture into a large bowl.
6. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
7. Spread the mixture into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until light brown.
9. Serve warm or chilled. Makes 6 servings.
